title: Senior Associate – Corporate Secretarial
metaDescription: Senior Associate – Corporate Secretarial role in Singapore: handle the full corporate secretarial spectrum and advise clients on compliance.
description: Join our rapidly expanding team. We are looking for an experienced Senior Associate to join our Corporate Secretarial Department in Singapore.
duties: Handle the full spectrum of corporate secretarial matters for a portfolio.
Prepare resolutions, minutes, and statutory filings with ACRA.
Advise clients on routine compliance and governance matters.
Maintain accurate statutory registers and records.
requirements: Strong knowledge of the Companies Act and ACRA requirements.
remuneration: Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
